name: Enhanced Custom Root CA
description: 🔒 Add a custom Root CA to your development environment

name.description: Name of the custom root CA certificate file.

sources.description: URL, or comma-separated list of URLs, of certificate files to download and add to the container trust store.

fingerprints.description: Optional comma-separated list of SHA-256 certificate fingerprints. When multiple source URLs are provided, fingerprints are matched to certificates by position.

bundle.description: Create a certificate bundle of all applied CAs.

allowInsecureDownload.description: Allow downloading certificates without validating the HTTPS server TLS certificate.
